m1_route_decision_source: P46 bounded multistate fixed-design TT adapter passed; no adaptive MATLAB TT-cross/SIRT reproduction evidence exists.

claim_boundary.primary_question: Is BayesFilter ready to attempt source-governed synthetic/model-suite paper-like filtering runs, excluding S&P 500, under explicit caps and guardrails?
allowed_claims: candidate rows have explicit eligibility states and resource caps
future production attempts have stop conditions and lower-rung prerequisites
forbidden_claims: production spatial SIR filtering is established
score API or HMC readiness is established
adaptive MATLAB TT-cross/SIRT reproduction is established
S&P 500 real-data reproduction is in scope

global_resource_caps.default_execution: CPU-only unless a phase-specific trusted GPU plan passes
global_resource_caps.required_first_run: cheapest lower-rung smoke before any larger horizon, dimension, rank, or basis ladder

required_before_correctness_claim: declared native, transformed, KSC-mixture, or separately reviewed approximation target
same unconstrained parameterization across reference, CUT4, and Zhao-Cui routes
value and gradient equality against exact, dense/refined, Kalman, or separately reviewed reference
stop_conditions: CUT4 and Zhao-Cui target identities differ
native generalized-SV claim is inferred from transformed diagnostic alone

required_before_correctness_claim: declared spatial SIR closure or native target
small-J dense/refined reference with observed and unobserved state diagnostics
same target and parameterization across reference, CUT4, and Zhao-Cui routes
stop_conditions: infectious-coordinate Gaussian closure is described as native SIR correctness
lower-rung equality is promoted as production filtering
domain policy for negative states is missing
unclassified rank, conditioning, memory, or time failure occurs

required_before_correctness_claim: production or near-paper-scale row preserving the declared lower-rung target
stop_conditions: production row changes target from lower-rung row without reviewed amendment
finite production output is treated as correctness
nonclaims: finite production manifest alone is not correctness

required_before_correctness_claim: declared additive-Gaussian RK closure or native target
small dense/refined reference with filtering value and state-quality metrics
same target and parameterization across reference, CUT4, and Zhao-Cui routes
stop_conditions: proposal or preconditioner metric is promoted as filtering correctness
lower-rung filtering is promoted as production filtering
target changes between reference, CUT4, and Zhao-Cui
nonclaims: no native predator-prey correctness unless separately reviewed

required_before_correctness_claim: production or near-paper-scale row preserving the declared lower-rung target
stop_conditions: production row changes target from lower-rung row without reviewed amendment
finite production output is treated as correctness
nonclaims: finite production manifest alone is not correctness

veto_diagnostics: PASS_P47_M0_GOVERNANCE or PASS_P47_M1_ADAPTIVE_ROUTE prerequisite is absent
M1 route label is absent or hidden behind generic Zhao-Cui wording
finite paper-scale output is promoted as correctness
rank, conditioning, memory, or time failure is unclassified
